title: Wake-up uplink resource assignment for power-efficient c-drx operation
abstract: Certain aspects of the present disclosure provide techniques for assignment of shared uplink resources for uplink transmissions triggered by detection of a wake-up signal (WUS).
claims: Claims 1. A method of wireless communication by a user equipment (UE), comprising: obtaining information regarding uplink resources assigned to the UE for an uplink transmission during a wake-up procedure after detecting at least one wake up signal (WUS) during a WUS occasion configured for the UE in a discontinuous reception (DRX) mode, wherein the UE shares uplink resources with one or more other UEs for sending their own uplink transmissions after WUS detection; and sending the uplink transmission, after detecting the WUS, using the assigned uplink resources. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein the uplink transmission is sent: between an end of the WUS and a start of an ON duration of the DRX mode; or during the ON duration. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the uplink transmission is sent to at least one of: confirm detection of the WUS; provide feedback regarding measurement of one or more reference signals (RS); or request one or more types of RS. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein the uplink transmission comprises at least one of: sounding reference signals (SRS); or UE status reporting. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the assigned uplink resources are for a physical uplink control channel (PUCCH) transmission or a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) transmission. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein the UE shares uplink resources with the one or more other UEs for sending their own uplink transmissions after WUS detection via at least one of: assignment of orthogonal frequency time uplink resources to different UEs; different spatial layers or beams assigned to different UEs; or different spreading codes, root sequences, or cyclic shift values assigned to different UEs. 7. The method of claim 1, wherein the information regarding uplink resources assigned to the UE is obtained via at least one of radio resource control (RRC) or media access control (MAC) control element (CE) signaling. 8. The method of claim 1, wherein the uplink resources assigned to the UE vary. 9. The method of claim 8, wherein the uplink resources assigned to the UE: vary depending on the resources used for transmission of the WUS; are indicated by the WUS; or vary according to a frequency hopping pattern. 10. The method of claim 9, wherein the UE determines the uplink resources assigned to the UE based on a mapping of the resources used for transmission of the WUS and uplink resources assigned to the UE. 11. A method of wireless communication by a network entity, comprising: signaling, to a user equipment, information regarding uplink resources assigned to the UE for an uplink transmission during a wake-up procedure after detecting at least one wake up signal (WUS) during a WUS occasion configured for the UE in a discontinuous reception (DRX) mode, wherein the UE shares uplink resources with one or more other UEs for sending their own uplink transmissions after WUS detection; sending the UE a WUS; and monitoring the assigned uplink resources for the uplink transmission, after sending the WUS. 12. The method of claim 11, wherein the assigned resources are for the uplink transmission to be sent: between an end of the WUS and a start of an ON duration of the DRX mode; or during the ON duration. 13. The method of claim 11, wherein the uplink transmission provides at least one of: confirmation of detection of the WUS; feedback regarding measurement of one or more reference signals (RS); or a request one or more types of RS. 14. The method of claim 11, wherein the uplink transmission comprises at least one of: sounding reference signals (SRS); or UE status reporting. 15. The method of claim 11, wherein the assigned uplink resources are for a physical uplink control channel (PUCCH) transmission or a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) transmission. 16. The method of claim 11, wherein the network entity multiplexes uplink resources for the UE and the one or more other UEs for sending their own uplink transmissions after WUS detection via at least one of: assignment of orthogonal frequency time uplink resources to different UEs; different spatial layers or beams assigned to different UEs; or different spreading codes, root sequences, or cyclic shift values assigned to different UEs. 17. The method of claim 11, wherein the information regarding uplink resources assigned to the UE is sent by the network entity via at least one of radio resource control (RRC) or media access control (MAC) control element (CE) signaling. 18. The method of claim 11, wherein the uplink resources assigned to the UE vary. 19. The method of claim 18, wherein the uplink resources assigned to the UE: vary depending on the resources used for transmission of the WUS are indicated by the WUS; or vary according to a frequency hopping pattern. 20. The method of claim 19, wherein the UE determines the uplink resources assigned to the UE based on a mapping of the resources used for transmission of the WUS and uplink resources assigned to the UE. 21. An apparatus for wireless communication by a user equipment (UE), comprising: means for obtaining information regarding uplink resources assigned to the UE for an uplink transmission during a wake-up procedure after detecting at least one wake up signal (WUS) during a WUS occasion configured for the UE in a discontinuous reception (DRX) mode, wherein the UE shares uplink resources with one or more other UEs for sending their own uplink transmissions after WUS detection; and means for sending the uplink transmission, after detecting the WUS, using the assigned uplink resources. 22. An apparatus for wireless communication by a network entity, comprising: means for signaling, to a user equipment, information regarding uplink resources assigned to the UE for an uplink transmission during a wake-up procedure after detecting at least one wake up signal (WUS) during a WUS occasion configured for the UE in a discontinuous reception (DRX) mode, wherein the UE shares uplink resources with one or more other UEs for sending their own uplink transmissions after WUS detection; means for sending the UE a WUS; and means for monitoring the assigned uplink resources for the uplink transmission, after sending the WUS.
